introSection: Shaman, previously known as Magic Mountain, is a Vekoma steel roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Italy. Sequoia Magic Loop was situated within the perimeter of this roller coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
For the 2008 season, the original Arrow Dynamics train chassis were replaced by Vekoma. For 2009, the bodies and restraints were replaced.

The ride was renamed Shaman in 2017 when it received virtual reality headsets. The ride was rethemed to Native Americans and a dream catcher theming element was added to the final helix.

The virtual reality was removed after the 2017 season. The longer wait times and technical problems where cited as reasons for its removal.

In 2021, much of the track was replaced. The layout of the roller coaster was not changed. After the retracking, cushions were installed on the train's restraints to cushion the impact of the second corkscrew.

In 2024 the old brakes were replaced with new magnetic brakes and some parts of the second corkscrew were changed, since the 2021 retracking was not done by Vekoma they were slightly incorrect.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and supports. The ride opened with white track and green supports.

fullText:
Shaman, previously known as Magic Mountain, is a Vekoma steel roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Italy. Sequoia Magic Loop was situated within the perimeter of this roller coaster.

For the 2008 season, the original Arrow Dynamics train chassis were replaced by Vekoma. For 2009, the bodies and restraints were replaced.

The ride was renamed Shaman in 2017 when it received virtual reality headsets. The ride was rethemed to Native Americans and a dream catcher theming element was added to the final helix.

The virtual reality was removed after the 2017 season. The longer wait times and technical problems where cited as reasons for its removal.

In 2021, much of the track was replaced. The layout of the roller coaster was not changed. After the retracking, cushions were installed on the train's restraints to cushion the impact of the second corkscrew.

In 2024 the old brakes were replaced with new magnetic brakes and some parts of the second corkscrew were changed, since the 2021 retracking was not done by Vekoma they were slightly incorrect.



Green track and supports. The ride opened with white track and green supports.
